mapper.select: SELECT USE_STPLAT_ID, USE_STPLAT_NM, USE_STPLAT_CN, INFO_PROVD_AGRE_CN, TO_CHAR(FRST_REGIST_PNTTM,'YYYY-MM-DD') FRST_REGIST_PNTTM , FRST_REGISTER_ID, TO_CHAR(LAST_UPDT_PNTTM,'YYYY-MM-DD') LAST_UPDT_PNTTM , LAST_UPDUSR_ID, VER, APLC_DE, REPRSNT_AT, USE_AT FROM TB_STPLAT_INFO WHERE USE_STPLAT_ID=#{useStplatId}

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT USE_STPLAT_ID, USE_STPLAT_NM, USE_STPLAT_CN, INFO_PROVD_AGRE_CN, TO_CHAR(FRST_REGIST_PNTTM,'YYYY-MM-DD') FRST_REGIST_PNTTM, FRST_REGISTER_ID, TO_CHAR(LAST_UPDT_PNTTM,'YYYY-MM-DD') LAST_UPDT_PNTTM, LAST_UPDUSR_ID, VER, APLC_DE, REPRSNT_AT, USE_AT FROM TB_STPLAT_INFO WHERE REPRSNT_AT = 'Y' AND COALESCE(USE_AT, 'Y') = 'Y' ORDER BY APLC_DE DESC, USE_STPLAT_ID DESC ) WHERE ROWNUM <= 1

SELECT USE_STPLAT_ID, USE_STPLAT_NM, USE_STPLAT_CN, INFO_PROVD_AGRE_CN, FRST_REGIST_PNTTM , FRST_REGISTER_ID, LAST_UPDT_PNTTM , LAST_UPDUSR_ID, VER, APLC_DE, REPRSNT_AT, USE_AT FROM ( SELECT ROWNUM RNUM,STP.* FROM ( SELECT USE_STPLAT_ID, USE_STPLAT_NM, TO_CHAR(USE_STPLAT_CN) USE_STPLAT_CN, TO_CHAR(INFO_PROVD_AGRE_CN) INFO_PROVD_AGRE_CN, FRST_REGIST_PNTTM , FRST_REGISTER_ID, LAST_UPDT_PNTTM , LAST_UPDUSR_ID, VER, APLC_DE, REPRSNT_AT, USE_AT FROM TB_STPLAT_INFO WHERE 1=1
AND USE_STPLAT_NM LIKE '%' || #{searchKeyword} || '%'
AND USE_STPLAT_CN LIKE '%' || #{searchKeyword} || '%'
ORDER BY USE_STPLAT_NM DESC ) STP ) WHERE ROWNUM <= #{recordCountPerPage} and RNUM > #{firstIndex}

SELECT COUNT(*) totcnt FROM TB_STPLAT_INFO WHERE 1=1
AND RECOMEND_SITE_NM LIKE '%' || #{searchKeyword} || '%'
AND RECOMEND_SITE_URL LIKE '%' || #{searchKeyword} || '%'
mapper.update: UPDATE TB_STPLAT_INFO SET REPRSNT_AT = 'N' WHERE REPRSNT_AT = 'Y'
UPDATE TB_STPLAT_INFO SET REPRSNT_AT = 'Y' WHERE USE_STPLAT_ID = #{useStplatId}
UPDATE TB_STPLAT_INFO SET USE_AT = #{useAt}, REPRSNT_AT = CASE WHEN #{useAt} = 'N' THEN 'N' ELSE REPRSNT_AT END, LAST_UPDT_PNTTM = sysdate WHERE USE_STPLAT_ID = #{useStplatId}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TB_STPLAT_INFO WHERE COALESCE(USE_AT, 'Y') = 'Y'
